Staff Backend Engineer, Distributed Systems

San Francisco, CA / Remote (US)
Engineering — Platform

About the role

ExampleCo is building the data platform that powers real-time decisioning for enterprise customers. As a Staff Backend Engineer on the Distributed Systems team, you will own the architecture of our streaming ingest pipeline, set technical direction across a team of six engineers, and partner with product on the roadmap for our next-generation event bus.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the technical design and implementation of the next iteration of our event routing layer, processing 2M+ events/sec across multi-region deployments.
  • Mentor senior and mid-level engineers through architectural reviews, pairing sessions, and written design docs.
  • Drive the quarterly planning cycle for the Platform team, translating product requirements into clear engineering milestones.
  • Partner with SRE on reliability targets; own the error budget for the ingest path.
  • Represent the team in cross-functional forums and present technical strategy to VP Engineering.

Requirements

  • 8+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 3 years building distributed systems at scale.
  • Deep expertise in Go or Rust; production experience with Kafka, Pulsar, or similar streaming platforms.
  • Track record of shipping multi-region, low-latency infrastructure; comfort with observability, SLOs, and capacity planning.
  • Strong written communication — you write design documents that align teams and make tradeoffs explicit.
  • Experience mentoring engineers and leading through influence, not authority.

Nice to have

  • Experience with Kubernetes, Terraform, and AWS primitives.
  • Background in data-intensive applications (database internals, query engines, stream processors).
  • Open-source contributions in the distributed systems space.

Compensation

Salary range: $240,000 – $310,000 base, plus equity and benefits. Range reflects US-wide geographic bands; final offer depends on level and location.

About ExampleCo

ExampleCo is a Series C startup with 200 employees, backed by top-tier venture firms. We are building the platform layer for real-time business intelligence.
